---
title: "C | Thema 6"
format: live-html
engine: knitr  
status: "Version 0.1"
lang: de 
---

{{< include _extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}
 
## MIMIC-Modelle und Differential Item Functioning (DIF)

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

webr::install("quadprog",  repos = "https://kroehne.github.io/webr-quadprog-repo")
 
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(mnormt))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaan))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaanPlot))  
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(psych))  
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(DT))

assignInNamespace("lav_options_checkinterval", function(x, nm, num2int) {
    if (any(is.na(x))) return(TRUE)
    if (num2int) x <- as.integer(x)                                                                                              
    oks <- vapply(x, function(x1) {
      (x1 > nm$bounds[1] || (x1 == nm$bounds[1] && nm$first.in)) &&                                                              
      (x1 < nm$bounds[2] || (x1 == nm$bounds[2] && nm$last.in))                                                                  
    }, TRUE)
    all(oks)                                                                                                                     
  }, ns = "lavaan")
 
View <- function(dat){
  dat_name <- deparse(substitute(dat))
  df_display <- dat |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), "❌ (NA)", .x))
  )
  
  DT::datatable(
    df_display,
    rownames = FALSE, 
    options = list(
      pageLength = 5,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      dom = 'tip',   
      columnDefs = list(list(className = 'dt-center', targets = "_all"))
    ),
    caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
      style = 'caption-side: top; text-align: left;',
      'data.frame: ', htmltools::strong(dat_name)
    )
  )  
}
```

### Präsentation

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true

# ============================================================================
# Thema 06: MIMIC-Modelle und Differential Item Functioning (DIF)
# Datensatz: psych::bfi (N=2800, Big Five + age, education, gender)
# ============================================================================

library(lavaan) 
library(lavaanPlot)

data(bfi, package = "psych")
dat <- bfi[complete.cases(bfi[, c(paste0("E", 1:5), "gender", "age", "education")]), ]
dat$E1r <- 7 - dat$E1
dat$E2r <- 7 - dat$E2

# ---- PRÄSENTATION: MIMIC-Modell für Extraversion ----

# Standard-CFA (ohne Kovariaten)
model_cfa <- 'E =~ E1r + E2r + E3 + E4 + E5'
fit_cfa <- cfa(model_cfa, data = dat)
summary(fit_cfa, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)

# MIMIC-Modell: Alter und Geschlecht sagen Extraversion vorher
model_mimic_base <- '
  # Messmodell
  E =~ E1r + E2r + E3 + E4 + E5

  # Strukturmodell: Kovariaten → latenter Faktor
  E ~ age + gender
'
fit_mimic_base <- sem(model_mimic_base, data = dat)
summary(fit_mimic_base, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)

# Pfaddiagramm

lavaanPlot(model = fit_mimic_base,   
     coefs = TRUE, stand = TRUE,covs = TRUE) 

# Fit-Vergleich CFA vs. MIMIC
cat("\n=== Fit-Vergleich ===\n")
comp <- data.frame(
  Modell = c("CFA (ohne Kovariaten)", "MIMIC (mit Alter + Geschlecht)"),
  CFI = c(fitMeasures(fit_cfa, "cfi"), fitMeasures(fit_mimic_base, "cfi")),
  RMSEA = c(fitMeasures(fit_cfa, "rmsea"), fitMeasures(fit_mimic_base, "rmsea")),
  AIC = c(fitMeasures(fit_cfa, "aic"), fitMeasures(fit_mimic_base, "aic"))
)
comp[, -1] <- round(comp[, -1], 3)
print(comp)

# Effekte der Kovariaten auf den latenten Faktor
cat("\n=== Effekte auf latente Extraversion ===\n")
pe <- parameterEstimates(fit_mimic_base, standardized = TRUE)
print(pe[pe$op == "~" & pe$lhs == "E", c("lhs", "op", "rhs", "est", "std.all", "pvalue")])

```

## Bericht

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
# ---- BERICHT: DIF-Prüfung mit MIMIC ----

# Schritt 1: MIMIC ohne direkte Effekte auf Items (= kein DIF)
# (= Basismodell, bereits geschätzt als fit_mimic_base)

# Schritt 2: MIMIC mit direkten Effekten auf jedes Item (= DIF-Modell)
# Direkte Effekte: Alter/Geschlecht → Item (über den latenten Faktor hinaus)

# DIF für Alter: Jedes Item einzeln testen
items <- c("E1r", "E2r", "E3", "E4", "E5")
dif_results_age <- data.frame(Item = character(), chi2_diff = numeric(),
                               p = numeric(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

for (item in items) {
  # Modell mit direktem Effekt age → item_j
  model_dif <- paste0('
    E =~ E1r + E2r + E3 + E4 + E5
    E ~ age + gender
    ', item, ' ~ age
  ')
  fit_dif <- sem(model_dif, data = dat)

  # Chi-Quadrat-Differenztest
  diff_test <- anova(fit_mimic_base, fit_dif)
  chi2_d <- diff_test$`Chisq diff`[2]
  p_val <- diff_test$`Pr(>Chisq)`[2]

  dif_results_age <- rbind(dif_results_age,
    data.frame(Item = item, chi2_diff = round(chi2_d, 3),
               p = round(p_val, 4)))
}

cat("\n=== DIF-Ergebnisse (Alter) ===\n")
dif_results_age$DIF <- ifelse(dif_results_age$p < 0.05, "JA", "nein")
print(dif_results_age)

# DIF für Geschlecht
dif_results_gender <- data.frame(Item = character(), chi2_diff = numeric(),
                                  p = numeric(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

for (item in items) {
  model_dif <- paste0('
    E =~ E1r + E2r + E3 + E4 + E5
    E ~ age + gender
    ', item, ' ~ gender
  ')
  fit_dif <- sem(model_dif, data = dat)
  diff_test <- anova(fit_mimic_base, fit_dif)

  dif_results_gender <- rbind(dif_results_gender,
    data.frame(Item = item,
               chi2_diff = round(diff_test$`Chisq diff`[2], 3),
               p = round(diff_test$`Pr(>Chisq)`[2], 4)))
}

cat("\n=== DIF-Ergebnisse (Geschlecht) ===\n")
dif_results_gender$DIF <- ifelse(dif_results_gender$p < 0.05, "JA", "nein")
print(dif_results_gender)


# Schritt 3: Finales MIMIC-Modell mit signifikanten DIF-Effekten

# Identifiziere DIF-Items
dif_items_age <- dif_results_age$Item[dif_results_age$p < 0.05]
dif_items_gender <- dif_results_gender$Item[dif_results_gender$p < 0.05]

cat("\nItems mit Alters-DIF:", paste(dif_items_age, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Items mit Geschlechts-DIF:", paste(dif_items_gender, collapse = ", "), "\n")

# Finales Modell: Alle signifikanten DIF-Effekte aufnehmen
dif_paths <- c()
for (item in dif_items_age) dif_paths <- c(dif_paths, paste0(item, " ~ age"))
for (item in dif_items_gender) dif_paths <- c(dif_paths, paste0(item, " ~ gender"))

model_final <- paste0('
  E =~ E1r + E2r + E3 + E4 + E5
  E ~ age + gender
  ', paste(dif_paths, collapse = "\n  "), '
')

cat("\n=== Finales MIMIC-Modell ===\n")
cat(model_final, "\n")

fit_final <- sem(model_final, data = dat)
summary(fit_final, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)

# Fit-Vergleich: Basis vs. Final
cat("\n=== Fit-Vergleich: Basis vs. DIF-Modell ===\n")
anova(fit_mimic_base, fit_final)

# Vergleich mit Multi-Gruppen-Ansatz (Thema 2)
cat("\n=== Vergleich: MIMIC-DIF vs. Multi-Gruppen-MI ===\n")
cat("MIMIC-Vorteil: Kovariate kann kontinuierlich sein (z.B. Alter)\n")
cat("Multi-Gruppen-Vorteil: Prüft alle Parameter gleichzeitig\n")
cat("Beide Methoden testen im Kern dasselbe: Funktioniert das Messinstrument\n")
cat("gleich gut für verschiedene Personengruppen?\n")

```
